title: Perfect Parity: Spring To Life Edition
description: A near 1:1 backport mod of the Spring to Life update
body: # Find the [The Garden Awakens (1.21.4) update here](https://modrinth.com/mod/perfect-parity-the-garden-awakens-edition)! ## Don't Wait I was sick of Mojang changing and breaking so many mods every update. I wanted to play with my modpack but didn't want to wait for the new features. So this mod asks: **"Why not both?"** Unlike many backport mods, this does **not** aim to backport between *major* versions (e.g., 1.21 → 1.20). Instead, it's a **minor version backport mod** — most mods I personally use are on 1.21.1 or 1.21.4. I don’t think it’s fair to choose between new features and mod compatibility. ![Perfect Parity 1.21.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131974b55e4b2734a1a6f6f8733a219a4b37fa77.png) --- ### ✨ Feature Parity ✅ Added cold and warm variants for Pig, Cow, and Chicken ✅ Sheep now spawn with biome-dependent wool colors ✅ Added new sound variants for Wolves ❌ Overhauled visuals for each Spawn Egg   – Find resource pack on [Vanilla Tweaks – Utility](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) ✅ Added fallen tree generation ✅ Added Firefly Bush block ✅ Added Leaf Litter block ✅ Added Wildflowers block ✅ Added Bush block ✅ Added Short Dry Grass and Tall Dry Grass blocks ✅ Added Cactus Flower block (can grow on Cactus) ❌ Added new falling leaf particles to Leaves blocks   – Try [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) instead — looks better than Mojang’s IMO ✅ New ambient block sounds in Desert and Badlands biomes > **BONUS**: All mobs, blocks, and items are **forward-compatible** with 1.21.5 if you update your save! --- ### 🧩 Compatibility ✅ **Should work with any 1.21.x mods** ✅ Compatible with most 1.21.5 resource packs 🐞 Found an issue? [Open an issue here.](https://github.com/timelord1102/PerfectParity/issues) #### Fresh Animations Compatibility (1.21.1) -> [Fresh Animations - Classic Horses by FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions/version/FK62bJ1i) : Use the 1.21 version -> [Fresh Animations - Extensions by FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions/version/1.5.2) : Use any 1.21.5 version -> PerfectParity x FreshAnimations : included -> [Fresh Animations by FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/version/1.9.2) : Use the 1.21.1 version ![Resource Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c6bc873a7b3bc5a4d174dbaf137d729e37df892.png) --- ### 📦 Dependencies #### Optional (1.21.1 Only) - [`Continuity`](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (required for **emissive Firefly Bush** textures) --- ### ⚠️ Disclaimer This mod is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to Mojang Studios, Microsoft**, or any of their subsidiaries. *Minecraft* is a trademark of Mojang Studios. All related assets, including textures, names, and game content, are the property of Mojang Studios and Microsoft. This project is fan-made and provided **for educational and entertainment purposes only**. No commercial use is intended or permitted.
